message:
fix(security): replace insecure Math.random() with crypto.getRandomValues()

Replace insecure Math.random() usage with cryptographically secure
alternatives using crypto.getRandomValues() in ID generation and
random selection:

- history.service.ts generateHistoryId(): Use crypto.getRandomValues()
  for generating history entry IDs
- account.service.ts generateId(): Use crypto.getRandomValues() for
  CAAM profile and pool ID generation
- rotation.ts selectRandom(): Use crypto.getRandomValues() for random
  account selection (consistent security practices)

Math.random() is not cryptographically secure and produces predictable
values. Using crypto.getRandomValues() ensures IDs are not guessable
and random selections cannot be predicted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
